expectations.evidence: Jumps straight to evaluating 'Reel' then listing alternatives. No upfront reasoning about core function or metaphor exploration before naming.
All 10 candidates (Groove, Reflex, Cadence, Relay, Motif, Trace, Drift, Pulse, Riff, Circuit) are real English words
No candidates use banned generic terms
10 distinct name candidates proposed across 3 tiers
Each candidate has an explanation of why it fits, plus a comparison table
Detailed 'Evaluation of Reel' section with 'What works', 'What doesn't work', and 'Verdict'
